# zenfra_vcs_repositories (Data Source)

Lists all Zenfra VCS repositories for a given integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zenfra_vcs_repositories" "all" {
  integration_id = data.zenfra_vcs_integration.github.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `integration_id` (String) The VCS integration ID to list repositories for.

### Read-Only

- `repositories` (Attributes List) List of VCS repositories. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repositories))

<a id="nestedatt--repositories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repositories`

Read-Only:

- `default_branch` (String) The default branch of the repository.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the repository is enabled in Zenfra.
- `full_name` (String) The full repository name (e.g. owner/repo).
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the VCS repository.
- `integration_id` (String) The VCS integration ID this repository belongs to.
- `provider` (String) The VCS provider type (github or gitlab).
- `visibility` (String) The visibility of the repository (e.g. public, private).
